html:
Exclusive to:

“Polly Roger will fly down and follow the wearer, fetching nearby items.”

-

Polly Roger's Hat is a Hat Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. Crafted with a Captain's Tricorn, Saffron Feather and Black Flag in the Clothing Filter. Can be sewn with a Sewing Kit or a Trusty Tape. The blueprint can be acquired from a Pirate Stash.

When the Hat is equipped, a parrot named Polly Roger appears.

Polly Roger

“Gathers loot nearby.”

-

Polly Roger is a bird that flies to a player equipped with Polly Roger's hat. Flying after the player Polly Roger picks up items from the ground within a 3.75 turf radius and brings them to the player's inventory. Polly Roger prioritizes items within this range that are farthest away from the player. It cannot pick up certain items, similar to the Lazy Forager, such as trap items or living mobs.

It is possible for certain mobs like Hounds to attack and even kill Polly Roger. After death the corresponding hat will have its cutlass emblem replaced by two crosses, indicating that its Polly Roger is dead and on cooldown, similar to how the Eye Bone does with Chester. It takes a full day for Polly Roger to respawn. If you despawn Polly Roger by unequipping the Hat it will return with the same health it had before despawning.

Usage

×5

Tips

  • Polly Roger is useful for picking up items found in the Ocean such as seeds or Messages in Bottles.
    • This can be especially useful when travelling on a boat with sails, as Polly Roger can grab items away from the boat's course without the need to slow the boat down.
  • To keep Polly Roger alive, simply unequip the hat if you are close to aggressive enemies or enemies that deal area of effect damage.

Gallery

  • Polly Roger's Hat Equipped
  • Dead Polly Roger's Hat Equipped

"polly_rogershat"
“A little bird told me it will come in handy.”
–Wilson
“Now that's stylish.”
–Willow
“Fancy feathers makes Wolfgang feel important.”
–Wolfgang
“The hat of a cutthroat pirate.”
–Wendy
“LARGE FEATHERS DENOTE IMPORTANCE, FOR SOME UNKNOWN BUT PRESUMABLY STUPID REASON”
–WX-78
“A bit ostentatious for my taste.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can't put my finger on it, but there's somethin' aboot it I don't like.”
–Woodie
“A bit theatrical, isn't it?”
–Maxwell
“I think it shall suit me well.”
–Wigfrid
“We're the famous pirate Webbeard! Arr!”
–Webber
“What a fine chapeau!”
–Warly
“Head thing with Tweeter clothes”
–Wormwood
“That's a real feather in my cap. Ha!”
–Winona
“A jaunty feather makes a hat look better.”
–Wortox
“Birdy feathers make it more fancy.”
–Wurt
“I have to be careful putting it on, Polly likes to sleep in it.”
–Walter
“What an eccentric design... I must have it.”
–Wanda
“Polly Roger will fly down and follow the wearer, fetching nearby items.”
-
Polly Roger's Hat is a Hat Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. Crafted with a Captain's Tricorn, Saffron Feather and Black Flag in the Clothing Filter. Can be sewn with a Sewing Kit or a Trusty Tape. The blueprint can be acquired from a Pirate Stash.
When the Hat is equipped, a parrot named Polly Roger appears.
Polly Roger[edit | edit source]
Polly Roger
Mob Info
50
Walking Speed
7
Running Speed
10
Special Ability
Picks up items automatically.
Miscellaneous
"polly_rogers"
“That's the little bird.”
–Wilson
“Polly wanna bring me stuff?”
–Willow
“Is faithful bird friend!”
–Wolfgang
“I would have preferred a raven.”
–Wendy
“SHE IS A DILIGENT MINION. I WILL TOLERATE HER PROXIMITY”
–WX-78
“Please squawk with your inside voice, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“Stay away from me, bird!!”
–Woodie
“There will be no perching on my shoulder. Got that, pal?”
–Maxwell
“She is a small, but stalwart ally.”
–Wigfrid
“She's our friend!”
–Webber
“Je m'excuse, I did not bring any crackers.”
–Warly
“Tweeter helping!”
–Wormwood
“Nice to have a little extra help around here.”
–Winona
“What spell compels her to help?”
–Wortox
“Bring me stuff, birdy!”
–Wurt
“Thanks for the help, Polly! You'd make a great Pinetree Pioneer.”
–Walter
“A pocket-sized helper, what could be better?”
–Wanda
“Gathers loot nearby.”
-
Polly Roger is a bird that flies to a player equipped with Polly Roger's hat. Flying after the player Polly Roger picks up items from the ground within a 3.75 turf radius and brings them to the player's inventory. After death the corresponding hat will have its cutlass emblem replaced by two crosses, indicating that its Polly Roger is dead and on cooldown, similar to how the Eye Bone does with Chester. It takes a full day for Polly Roger to respawn. If you despawn Polly Roger by unequipping the Hat it will return with the same health it had before despawning.

×5

This can be especially useful when travelling on a boat with sails, as Polly Roger can grab items away from the boat's course without the need to slow the boat down.

'''Polly Roger's Hat''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. Crafted with a Captain's Tricorn, Saffron Feather and Black Flag in the Clothing Filter. Can be sewn with a [[Sewing Kit]] or a [[Trusty Tape]]. The blueprint can be acquired from a [[Pirate Stash]].

When the Hat is equipped, a parrot named Polly Roger appears.

{{Clear}}

Polly Roger is a bird that flies to a player equipped with Polly Roger's hat. Flying after the player Polly Roger picks up items from the ground within a 3.75 turf radius and brings them to the player's inventory. Polly Roger prioritizes items within this range that are farthest away from the player. It cannot pick up certain items, similar to the [[The Lazy Forager|Lazy Forager]], such as trap items or living mobs.

It is possible for certain mobs like [[Hound]]s to attack and even kill Polly Roger. After death the corresponding hat will have its cutlass emblem replaced by two crosses, indicating that its Polly Roger is dead and on cooldown, similar to how the [[Eye Bone]] does with [[Chester]]. It takes a full day for Polly Roger to respawn. If you despawn Polly Roger by unequipping the Hat it will return with the same health it had before despawning.
{{clear}}

== {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Polly Roger is useful for picking up items found in the [[Ocean]] such as [[seeds]] or [[Message in a Bottle|Messages in Bottles]].
** This can be especially useful when travelling on a boat with sails, as Polly Roger can grab items away from the boat's course without the need to slow the boat down.
* To keep Polly Roger alive, simply unequip the hat if you are close to aggressive enemies or enemies that deal area of effect damage.
